mapper.select: SELECT * FROM repo ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE repo SET name = #{name}, git_url = #{gitUrl}, gitlab_host = #{gitlabHost}, project_path = #{projectPath}, auth_type = #{authType}, access_token = #{accessToken}, username = #{username}, password = #{password}, branch_prefix = #{branchPrefix}, swagger_paths = #{swaggerPaths}, actuator_path = #{actuatorPath}, jvm_args = #{jvmArgs}, spring_profile = #{springProfile}, modules = #{modules}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
